Returned 0 search results for ""Duke basketball" "2026" tournament Final Four championship".

pick.rationale: Purdue enters this championship matchup with the tournament's highest NET rating (40.1) and KenPom rating (38.3), holding a consistent 1.8-point advantage over Duke in both major metrics. As the Midwest region's #1 seed facing the East region's #1 seed, this is a clash of elite programs, but Purdue's superior analytical profile and Big Ten battle-tested resume give them the edge. While Duke's championship pedigree and ACC strength make this a competitive final, Purdue's status as the bracket's top-rated team overall provides the slight advantage needed to capture the title.

reasoningStep.title: Championship Game: Purdue vs Duke Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Analyzed metrics and seeding for both #1 seeds in the championship game. Purdue holds the highest NET (40.1) and KenPom (38.3) ratings in the entire tournament bracket, with a 1.8-point advantage over Duke (38.3 NET, 36.5 KenPom) in both key metrics.
evidence: Team data shows Purdue as Midwest #1 seed with NET 40.1 and KenPom 38.3
Duke is East #1 seed with NET 38.3 and KenPom 36.5
Purdue has the highest ratings of all 64 teams in the bracket
Both teams are elite #1 seeds representing different regions
